USB 设备共享解决方案 USB Device Sharing Solution

VirtualHere USB Server

通过网络远程访问 USB 设备，如同本地连接一般 Access USB devices remotely over the network, as if locally connected

用户空间运行 Userspace 静态编译 Statically Compiled 零依赖 No Dependencies
试用版限制 Trial Version Limitation 试用版只能连接一个 USB 设备。如需移除此限制，请购买授权许可证。 Trial version allows connecting only one USB device. Purchase a license to remove this limitation.
授权信息 License Information 授权文件请放置在数据目录的 data 文件夹下 Please place the license file in the data directory

客户端配置 Client Configuration

在 VirtualHere 客户端中添加以下服务器地址： Add the following server address in VirtualHere client:

在客户端的"指定集线器"功能中粘贴此地址 Paste this address in the client's "Specify Hubs" feature

产品简介 Product Overview

VirtualHere USB Server 实现了通过网络远程访问 USB 设备。服务器完全运行在用户空间，因此比基于内核的解决方案更加稳定。VirtualHere 是第一家创建完全用户空间 USB 服务器的公司。 The VirtualHere USB Server enables remote access to USB devices over a network. The server runs entirely in userspace, making it inherently more stable than kernel-based solutions. VirtualHere was the first company to create this entirely userspace USB server.

无需编译或内核模块，现在 VirtualHere 再次创新！服务器完全静态编译，服务器端完全不需要任何 Linux 运行时库！服务器可以作为纯控制台守护进程运行，便于集成到运行级脚本中。诊断消息输出到系统日志。 No compilation or kernel modules are required, and now VirtualHere has innovated again! The server is entirely statically compiled, no Linux run-time libraries are required at all on the server! The server can be run as a console-only daemon for easy integration into run-level scripts. Diagnostic messages are output to syslog.

OEM 集成优势 OEM Integration Benefits

VirtualHere 非常适合 OEM 集成，因为： VirtualHere is perfect for OEM integration because:

自带设备支持 Bring Your Own Device
将任何基于 Linux 的设备变成 USB 服务器！例如树莓派、桌面电脑、路由器、交换机、刀片服务器或您的定制 PCB。 Turn any Linux-based device into a USB Server! E.g. Raspberry Pi, desktop, router, switch, blade server or your custom PCB.
用户空间运行 Entirely Userspace
比基于内核的解决方案更稳定且更容易更新。任何服务器问题都不会导致整个设备崩溃。 Much more stable and easier to update than kernel-based solutions. Any server problems won't crash the entire device.
通用兼容性 Universal Compatibility
服务器完全自包含，将在任何版本的 Linux 内核和任何架构上运行！OEM 部署变得非常简单。 Entirely self-contained, runs on any version of the Linux Kernel and any architecture! Makes OEM deployment trivial.
简单配置 Simple Configuration
所有设置都存储在一个简单的文本文件中，自动生成合理的默认值，没有复杂的注册表设置。 All settings stored in a simple text file with sensible auto-generated defaults. No complicated registry settings.
性价比高 Competitive Pricing
极具竞争力的单位成本 Very competitive per unit cost
持续更新 Active Development
积极的产品开发和频繁的修复、改进和更新，更新和错误修复免费！ Active product development with frequent fixes, improvements, and updates. Updates and bug fixes are free!

技术特性 Technical Features

  • 单个服务器可共享多达 122 个设备，支持 6 层集线器深度 A single server can share up to 122 devices up to 6 hubs deep
  • 通过简单的 bash 脚本实现细粒度身份验证，轻松连接到现有的身份验证后端 Fine-grained authentication using simple bash scripting. Easily connect to your existing auth backend
  • 支持 SSL 加密，在通过互联网共享时提供更好的窃听保护 Supports SSL for better protection from eavesdroppers when sharing over the Internet
  • 通过简单脚本轻松解决设备问题 Easily work around device quirks through simple scripting
  • 使用 Bonjour 协议广播服务，允许客户端自动发现服务器 Uses Bonjour protocol to broadcast services, allowing clients to auto-find servers
  • 所有通信在单个 TCP 端口 (7575) 上进行，防火墙设置简单，操作无需互联网访问 All communications on a single TCP port (7575) for easy firewall setup, no internet access required for operation
  • 支持 VirtualHere EasyFind 系统，无需网络设置，可从任何地方连接到您的服务器！ Supports VirtualHere EasyFind System - no network setup needed, connect from anywhere!
  • IPv6 support
  • 客户端可作为服务运行，通过易于使用的 API 进行控制 Client can run as a service, controlled via an easy-to-use API
  • 客户端是单个可执行文件，无依赖项 Client is a single executable with no dependencies
  • 可以为您的特定 CPU 架构进行定制编译 Can be custom compiled for your specific CPU architecture
访问 VirtualHere 官网 Visit VirtualHere Website

© VirtualHere
